title: Woman gang-raped in sleeper bus in New Delhi
summary: Delhi Police have registered a case and arrested two individuals after a woman alleged gangrape in a private bus. The bus used in the incident has been seized, and authorities are conducting a thorough investigation into the matter from all possible angles. n Delhi, Driver And Conductor Arrested angrape on private bus, 2 arrested The er, conductor inside bus in Delhi; accused arrested r alleged gang-rape in a moving bus in Delhi’s Nangloi The According to the complaint, the woman alleged that two men raped her inside the bus. The bus driver and conductor, have been arrested The two accused have reportedly been arrested in connection with the incident that took place on May 12 in West Delhi's Nangloi.
